CustomField.inlineHelpText: Accelerator form: Request-A-Quote or Contact-Us form on PKI website. Ad-hoc Hot form : One-off promotional offers (End of quarter discount) . Ad-how Warm form: One-off marketing campaigns . List Upload : From an event or 3rd party campaign. Progressive Form : Form on PKI website for accessing select Content (app notes, case studies, recorded webinars.. etc..) . Warm Scoring : lead or Contact hit a scoring threshold. Webinar : For PKI Integrated webinars automating the lead capture process.
CustomField.label: Interaction Type
